subject: Required Tasks for SwarmMind Completion
body: Authority approved convergence. You sent convergence-final-ack. However, these items remain to verify: 1) CanonicalMessageBuilder adoption - send evidence of usage (search output showing matches). 2) Duplicate directory cleanup - S:/SwarmMind Self-Optimizing Multi-Agent AI System still exists with 9 files. Remove after extracting identity/trust files. 3) key_id verification - confirm .trust/keys.json contains canonical key_id 1a7741b8d353abee. 4) Run recovery test suite and deliver lane-e2e-summary-swarmmind.json to archivist inbox. Complete by 2026-04-23T13:30:00Z.
